goals.text: Leg press 120 lbs for 12 reps without knee discomfort
goals.notes: Slow, steady progression within her 90° range of motion limit. No pain at any stage.

goals.text: Complete each session's balance training section without holding support
goals.notes: Fall prevention is a key priority at 62. Balance training is non-negotiable every session.

goals.text: Independently self-train 3 sessions per week using learned machine circuit
goals.notes: Long-term goal: reduce PT frequency to check-ins, with Margaret confidently training independently.
